layers.title: Edge compute & personal state
layers.note: Low-latency path; DO isolation per cryptographic subject. Not replaced by chain—paired with L2/L7 for proofs and money.

layers.title: EVM transparency anchor
layers.note: SMART five-pack: S/M/A/R/T — ABIs in p31-smart-evm.json and hub contract builder. Deploy addresses in p31-chain-anchor.json.

layers.title: EVM content roots (IPFS / Arweave CIDs)
layers.note: Operator-owned key→CID map for hub/dist snapshots; rotate owner to multisig (L10).

layers.title: Public HTTPS manifests
layers.note: Canonical JSON contracts + verify bar; mirror to p31ca public/. Anchor digests on L2; CIDs on L3.

layers.title: Cryptographic identity (WebAuthn / passkeys)
layers.note: Proof-of-possession routing; no ledger required. DID sidecar is L6.

layers.title: Decentralized identifiers & attestations
layers.note: Pairwise DIDs + selective disclosure; anchor DID doc hash via L2. No vendor lock-in for join keys.

layers.title: Fiat payments & receipts
layers.note: Operator Grant / Sponsors; donate-api Worker. Receipt hashes can be anchored on L2.

layers.title: On-chain payments & treasury
layers.note: Stablecoin treasuries on Base; multisig (Safe) as owner of L3 + upgrade keys; policy text in L4 JSON.

layers.title: Content network pinning
layers.note: Pin p31ca dist/ + contract-registry; store CID in P31ContentRoot. Automate in CI post-deploy.

layers.title: On-chain governance & custody
layers.note: Transfer P31ContentRoot owner + deploy keys to Safe; document signers in nonprofit records (off-chain) + hash on L2.

layers.title: Censorship-resistant frontends
layers.note: Immutable build CID in L3; multiple gateways; ENS contenthash optional.

layers.title: Indexing & auditability
layers.note: Index Anchored / RootSet events; correlate with git SHA in L4 manifests.
